Class ProjectGoalService

java.lang.Object
de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.service.project.ProjectGoalService
@Service @Transactional public class ProjectGoalService extends Object
Manages the goals of a project and derives progress from them. Goals are project-scoped: every operation goes through the owning project so that the membership-based authorization of ProjectService applies (manager may modify, members may read).

Progress is never stored. A goal's completion is the share of its counting tasks (all tasks assigned to the goal except TaskStatus.CANCELLED ones) that have reached a done status (TaskStatus.FINISHED or TaskStatus.CLOSED). A goal without counting tasks — and a project without any such goal — has no defined progress (null).

Author:
peter haller

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final record 
    ProjectGoalService.GoalData
    Editable goal fields, decoupling the service from HTTP DTOs.
    static final record 
    ProjectGoalService.GoalProgress
    Completion of a single goal; percentage is null without counting tasks.
    static final record 
    ProjectGoalService.ProjectProgress
    Overall project progress; overallPercentage is null when undefined.

  • Constructor Details

    • ProjectGoalService

      public ProjectGoalService()

  • Method Details

    • createGoal

      public ProjectGoal createGoal(Long projectId, ProjectGoalService.GoalData data, PUser user)
      Creates a goal on the given project. Manager only.
      Parameters:
      projectId - the owning project's id
      data - the goal's initial fields (with optional properties)
      user - the requesting user
      Returns:
      the persisted goal

    • getGoals

      @Transactional(readOnly=true) public List<ProjectGoal> getGoals(Long projectId, PUser user)

    • getGoal

      @Transactional(readOnly=true) public ProjectGoal getGoal(Long projectId, Long goalId, PUser user)

    • updateGoal

      public ProjectGoal updateGoal(Long projectId, Long goalId, ProjectGoalService.GoalData data, PUser user)
      Updates a goal's fields and replaces its properties. Manager only.

    • deleteGoal

      public void deleteGoal(Long projectId, Long goalId, PUser user)
      Deletes a goal. Any tasks pointing at it are detached first (their goal is cleared), so a deletion never orphans a foreign key. Manager only.

    • computeProgress

      @Transactional(readOnly=true) public ProjectGoalService.ProjectProgress computeProgress(Long projectId, PUser user)
      Computes the progress of a project from its goals and their tasks. Manager or member.
      Parameters:
      projectId - the project id
      user - the requesting user
      Returns:
      per-goal and overall completion; percentages are null where undefined
